R1.0 Release Report

Delivery date: 2026-07-15. Owner: ProjectX team.

CJK smoke test: 重要释放报告 (release report). Emoji smoke test: 🚀 ✅

TypeKeySummaryStatus
StoryPROJ-1Implement export pipeline for release reporting with a fairly long summary to force wrappingDone
BugPROJ-2Fix baseline JQL queryDone
 
project = ProjectX AND fixVersion = R1.0 AND status != Done
